query:
INSERT INTO host_listings (
  hostName,
  title,
  cuisineStyle,
  district,
  pricePerPerson,
  profilePhotoUrl,
  foodPhotoUrls,
  bio,
  otherPassions,
  menuDescription,
  languages,
  maxGuests,
  email,
  wechatOrPhone,
  availability,
  mealDurationMinutes,
  status,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'Bonnie',
  'Shanghai Dumpling-Making & Local Cuisine Experience',
  'Shanghai & Northern Chinese',
  'Jing''An',
  560,
  'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/lvwGNUrOrrtbBwCH.jpeg',
  '["https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/nJJHsTheBbBKZcDN.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/FXXEtOXtfygpjUeG.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/JUSHchuPwfsJXMOo.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/ObWsETSnPhRgqSWj.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/ozDEYTsJWrzhnpiC.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/AxcXEibKWihDWsnG.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/ulHwckdKqRJwjOpC.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/fbQszrDijYrmUCRp.webp","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/JPhIjvltmcoFIvuZ.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/KrSdxYRdjIOhkVZU.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/TymgBmXnLSjajmDR.jpeg"]',
  'A passionate Shanghai homemaker who loves sharing authentic Chinese culinary traditions with visitors from around the world. Bonnie specializes in traditional dumpling-making and Northern Chinese cuisine, offering an immersive cultural experience that goes beyond just cooking.',
  'Cultural exchange, travel, sharing Shanghai stories with visitors from different backgrounds.',
  'Learn to make authentic Shanghai dumplings from scratch, including rolling dough, shaping wrappers, and mixing fillings. After the hands-on cooking class, enjoy a main dish of local cuisine with tea, beverages, and snacks. Menu includes dumplings and seasonal local dishes. Vegan options available upon request.',
  '["English","Mandarin"]',
  6,
  'shugenbaba@gmail.com',
  'WeChat available',
  '{\"monday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"tuesday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"wednesday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"thursday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"friday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"saturday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"sunday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"]}',
  210,
  'approved',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute INSERT INTO host_listings (
  hostName,
  title,
  cuisineStyle,
  district,
  pricePerPerson,
  profilePhotoUrl,
  foodPhotoUrls,
  bio,
  otherPassions,
  menuDescription,
  languages,

  status,

  'A passionate Shanghai homemaker who loves sharing authentic Chinese culinary traditions with visitors from around the world. Bonnie specializes in traditional dumpling-making and Northern Chinese cuisine, offering an immersive cultural experience that goes beyond just cooking.',
  'Cultural exchange, travel, sharing Shanghai stories with visitors from different backgrounds.',
  'Learn to make authentic Shanghai dumplings from scratch, including rolling dough, shaping wrappers, and mixing fillings. After the hands-on cooking class, enjoy a main dish of local cuisine with tea, beverages, and snacks. Menu includes dumplings and seasonal local dishes. Vegan options available upon request.',
  '["English","Mandarin"]',
  6,
  'shugenbaba@gmail.com',
  'WeChat available',
  '{\"monday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"tuesday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"wednesday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"thursday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"friday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"saturday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"],\"sunday\":[\"lunch\",\"dinner\"]}',
  210,
  'approved',
